overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a female character walking along a modern city waterfront promenade before transitioning onto a multi-lane bridge with vehicle traffic. The scene features contemporary glass architecture, a river, tiered concrete seating, and distant mountains under a bright partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront pedestrian promenade with tiered seating

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade beside a metal railing with water to the right

entered.detail: metal guardrail separating walkway from the waterway
multi-story building with stepped terraces and greenery on balconies
tall dark reflective office tower dominating the skyline
amphitheater-style stepped concrete platforms descending toward the water
calm waterway reflecting the sky and surrounding structures

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide waterfront promenade with a metal railing separating the path from the river. To the left stands a terraced residential building, while tiered concrete seating structures line the water's edge. A prominent black glass skyscraper rises in the distance against a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane bridge over water with mountain views

events.description: character steps from pedestrian walkway onto the bridge road surface
large white box truck passes by from left to right on the bridge

agents.ego_description: walking along the bridge roadway, continuing forward as vehicles pass by

notable_agents.action: white box truck driving past the character from behind on the left
white van approaching in the distance on the bridge

entered.detail: multi-lane road surface with white lane markings
large commercial truck with white trailer passing by
metal safety barrier along the edge of the bridge
low-rise building with green facade visible beyond the bridge railing
distant mountains visible beyond the city buildings

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the pedestrian walkway onto a multi-lane bridge, where a large white truck passes by closely. The scene opens to reveal distant mountains ahead and the river now visible to the left. The character continues walking along the asphalt road as a white van approaches in the distance, with modern office towers visible on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a structured urban waterfront promenade onto an open, multi-lane bridge. It begins with the character walking along a wide path bordered by a metal railing, passing tiered concrete seating and a terraced residential building while a black glass skyscraper looms in the distance. As the character moves forward, the pedestrian walkway transitions into an asphalt road, where the perspective opens up to reveal the river on the left and distant mountains ahead. The scene then shifts into the flow of traffic as a large white truck passes closely, before the camera continues forward toward an approaching white van with modern office towers lining the right side of the bridge.
